item.title: Maestral, the Open Source Splendidly Simple Mac Dropbox Client, Has Been Retired 摘要
item.description:
Maestral, the open-source Dropbox client for Mac that offered a simple, lightweight syncing experience, has been retired by its developer Sam Schott as of June 2026. The project is archived on GitHub, and while the current version will continue to work until certificates expire, no further updates or maintenance will be provided. Schott cited lack of time and personal disuse of Dropbox as reasons. The author expresses disappointment, praising Maestral's simplicity and low resource usage compared to Dropbox's official client, and considers migrating to iCloud Drive as an alternative.
标签: Maestral, Dropbox, open-source, Mac, sync, retirement, software, maintenance, cloud storage, iCloud

item.title: ATP Member Special: Mac-Assed Mac Apps 摘要
item.description:
The Accidental Tech Podcast released a members-only special episode discussing what defines a 'Mac-assed' Mac app, focusing on design principles and user experience. The episode explores why both users and developers should prioritize native, well-crafted Mac applications. ATP memberships cost $8/month or $88/year, with the exclusive episodes alone justifying the subscription. The podcast effectively explains the characteristics of quality Mac software and the importance of platform-specific design.
标签: podcast, Mac, app design, user experience, software development, Apple, technology, membership

item.title: Allen Pike, Back in November: ‘Why Is ChatGPT for Mac So Good?’ 摘要
item.description:
John Gruber discusses why ChatGPT's Mac app excels due to native features like live document attachment, which iOS cannot support due to restricted inter-app communication. He contrasts this with Anthropic's Claude, which lacks a native Mac app, and notes Google's Gemini Mac app is subpar despite being native. Gruber speculates on Anthropic's potential to improve, but observes that CPO Mike Krieger has shifted to leading Anthropic's Labs team for experimental products rather than focusing on delightful tools.
标签: ChatGPT, Mac app, native vs web, Anthropic, Claude, Google Gemini, iOS limitations, AI tools, product design, John Gruber

item.title: Backblaze Versus Dropbox 摘要
item.description:
Backblaze has stopped backing up files from cloud storage services like iCloud Drive, Dropbox, Google Drive, and OneDrive due to Apple's File Provider APIs, which make files appear locally but are not fully downloaded. This has caused confusion and concern among users. The author notes that using Maestral, an open-source Dropbox client that syncs files to a regular folder, allows Backblaze to back up Dropbox content normally. Dropbox's own client may still work in an old-school mode, but results vary. The author prefers Maestral to avoid these issues.
标签: Backblaze, Dropbox, iCloud Drive, Google Drive, OneDrive, Maestral, File Provider APIs, backup, cloud storage, macOS

item.title: Markdown Now Has a UTI in Apple’s Version 27 OSes 摘要
item.description:
Apple's third developer betas of its 27 OSes include a new built-in Uniform Type Identifier (UTI) for Markdown data: net.daringfireball.markdown, which conforms to public.utf8-plain-text. John Gruber, the creator of Markdown, notes that this enshrines UTF-8 encoding, a change from his earlier recommendation of public.plain-text. He updated his own recommendation to reflect this, citing that UTF-8 support is now universal, unlike in 2004.
标签: Apple, Markdown, UTI, UTF-8, developer betas, macOS, iOS, documentation, file types, encoding

item.title: ★ Apple Should Eliminate the App Icon ‘Squircle Jail’ 摘要
item.description:
Apple's mandatory squircle shape for macOS app icons has drawn criticism from developers and designers, who argue it reduces icon distinctiveness and usability. Critics like Paul Kafasis and John Siracusa contend that forcing all icons into identical shapes harms recognition and creativity, comparing it to making traffic signs uniform. The policy extends to color removal via Liquid Glass's tinted/clear options, which are unpopular. Commentators advocate for allowing varied icon shapes, as was historically the case, to preserve visual differentiation and iconic identity.
标签: Apple, macOS, app icons, design, usability, squircle, developer experience, Liquid Glass, iconography, UI/UX

item.title: tencent/Hy3 摘要
item.description:
Tencent released Hy3, a 295B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with 21B active parameters, under Apache 2.0 license. It outperforms similar-size models and rivals models with 2-5x more parameters. The model has 256K context length, is available in full (598GB) and FP8 quantized (300GB) versions on Hugging Face, and is free on OpenRouter until July 21st.
标签: AI, LLM, MoE, Tencent, open-source, Hugging Face, OpenRouter, generative AI, China
